turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan hello. Mujhe ek psychiatrist se milna hai. Pehle kabhi nahi gaya, so, uh, thoda nervous hoon.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Main samajhta hoon, aur yeh bahut brave step hai ki aap reach out kar rahe hain. Hamare paas Dr. Sangeeta Reddy hain, jo bahut compassionate aur experienced hain. Aapko comfortable feel karana unki priority hoti hai.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Theek hai. Kab available hain woh?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Dr. Reddy Thursday ko 3 PM se 6 PM aur Saturday ko 10 AM se 1 PM available hain. Aapke liye kaun sa din sahi rahega?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Saturday 10 AM rakh do. Naam hai mera Aryan Oberoi, number 9811234560.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Confirmed, Aryan. Dr. Sangeeta Reddy ke saath, Saturday 10 AM. Yaad rakhein — pehli meeting mein sirf conversation hoti hai, koi pressure nahi. SMS aayega aapke paas.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bahut acha kiya. Khyaal rakhein apna.
